answers.label: High School Student / No degree yet
I like creating, designing, or making things
Mixed — I want variety in my environment
Balanced — good pay and meaningful work
I want to run my own business / freelance
Working outdoors with trees and plants (arboriculture)

steps.title: Foundations

milestones.title: Complete Industry Fundamentals
milestones.description: Achieve the objective 'Understand the core concepts of arborist (tree surgeon)' by completing tasks such as: (A certificate or), (Learn tree identification).

tasks.title: (A certificate or)
tasks.description: Complete a certificate or bachelor's degree in arboriculture, forestry, or horticulture

tasks.title: (Learn tree identification)
tasks.description: Learn tree identification, climbing techniques, and aerial rigging
